titles.title: I Have a Home Beyond the River

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh the blessed contemplation When with trouble here I sigh I have a home beyond the river; That I’ll enter by and by.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have a home beyond the river I have a mansion bright and fair I have a home beyond the river; I will dwell with Jesus there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh how sweet ‘twill be to meet there, All the ransomed hosts above; Sweeter still to see the Saviour, Praise Him for redeeming love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tho’ the world is filled with sorrows, And the teardrops often fall; There will be but joy and gladness, Safe inside the jasper wall.

verse.name: v5
